summary: Iteration_14 verified: Trello-style /admin/contacts/pipeline board, outreach.setPipelineStage atomic timestamp rewrites, repliedAt column on outreach.list, and updated CALENDLY_DEFAULT_URL (https://calendly.com/ownology/new-meeting). Backend 11/11 pytest pass in /app/backend/tests/test_pipeline_iter14.py covering: (a) outreach.bySlug for nathan-brokenwood-wines returns calendlyUrl='https://calendly.com/ownology/new-meeting' (env default applied; calendlyOverride still null), (b) setPipelineStage full traversal lead→sent→awaiting→replied→booked→lead with exact timestamp side-effects (lead clears all three; sent/awaiting stamp smsSentAt only and null out repliedAt/demoBookedAt; replied stamps smsSentAt+repliedAt and nulls demoBookedAt; booked stamps smsSentAt+demoBookedAt), (c) idempotency — calling stage='sent' twice with a 1.2s gap keeps the original smsSentAt unchanged, (d) zod rejects invalid stage 'won' with 400, (e) unknown slug returns non-200 with 'not found' in the error payload, (f) outreach.list rows all carry a repliedAt key (null for most, set for ollie-margan-wines). Frontend verified on https://ownership-dev.preview.emergentagent.com/admin/contacts/pipeline: page mounts with [data-testid=admin-pipeline-page]; five columns (lead/sent/awaiting/replied/booked) each have [data-testid=pipeline-column-<stage>] and [data-testid=pipeline-count-<stage>] with counts 26/0/1/1/1; KPIs [data-testid=pipeline-kpi-total]=29, pipeline-kpi-booked=1, pipeline-kpi-rate=3.4%, pipeline-kpi-engaged=2; Jane Tyrrells card sits in awaiting with metadata pills '👁 3 📨 2m'; Ollie Margan Wines in replied with '📨 2m 💬 2m'; Sarah Mount Pleasant in booked with '📨 2m ✅ 2m'; sales contacts (manly-spirits, guillermo-archie-rose-spirits) excluded from all five columns. Drag-and-drop verified via the documented API-fallback path (page.evaluate → POST /api/trpc/outreach.setPipelineStage {slug:'jane-tyrrells', stage:'booked'} → 200 ok); after reload Jane's card appears under pipeline-column-booked, pipeline-kpi-booked increments to 2, and booking rate updates to 6.9% — confirming the atomic timestamp rewrite + re-derivation pipeline is wired end-to-end. Jane restored to awaiting after test. /admin/contacts header has [data-testid=link-to-pipeline] with text 'Pipeline board →' and href='/admin/contacts/pipeline'; clicking it navigates to the board page. /admin/contacts regression intact: 31 rows, KPIs (Contacts=31, SMS Sent=3, Opened=2, Booked=1), 5 filter chips (All/Warm/Lukewarm/Cold/Sales-Vendor/Skip) visible. /hi/nathan-brokenwood-wines primary CTA [data-testid=hi-cta-primary] href === 'https://calendly.com/ownology/new-meeting'.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/server/routers/outreach.ts:155-213 setPipelineStage — the switch case for 'sent' and 'awaiting' is intentionally identical (same DB state, board distinguishes via viewCount). That means dragging a card from 'awaiting' back to 'sent' is a silent no-op (data unchanged) and the UI will snap it right back to awaiting because viewCount stays >0. Acceptable per the derived-stage spec, but a UX surprise — consider either disabling the 'sent' drop target when the card has been viewed, or showing a toast 'card already opened — staying in Awaiting'.

/app/server/routers/outreach.ts:201-205 stage='booked' — code leaves repliedAt alone ('booking implies they engaged'). However, if a card is dragged directly Lead→Booked it will land in 'booked' with smsSentAt and demoBookedAt set but repliedAt=null — that's fine. The subtler case: dragging 'replied' → 'lead' clears repliedAt, then 'lead' → 'booked' will NOT re-stamp repliedAt. The card lands in booked correctly (deriveStage prioritises demoBookedAt) but the engagement timeline is now lossy. Minor; document the rule or add a 'lastEngagedAt' column if a richer timeline matters.

/app/client/src/pages/AdminContactsPipeline.tsx:67 — trpc.outreach.list.useQuery() has no refetchInterval / staleTime tuning. Multiple admin tabs open on the board will not see each other's drops until manual reload. Consider adding refetchOnWindowFocus or a 30s polling interval.

/app/client/src/pages/AdminContactsPipeline.tsx:95-107 handleDrop — onSuccess only invalidates; no optimistic update. There's a visible flash where the card pops back to its old column for ~200ms before refetch settles. Add an optimistic update via utils.outreach.list.setData or queryClient.setQueryData to eliminate the flicker.

/app/client/src/pages/AdminContactsPipeline.tsx:138-144 — fixed 5-column grid 'repeat(5, minmax(0, 1fr))' will be unreadable on mobile/tablet. Consider a horizontal-scroll wrapper (overflow-x:auto + min-width on columns) for viewports < 1024px, or a stacked-list fallback.

Carried from iteration_12/13 (not regressed by this iteration): nested <a> hydration warning on /admin header; intermittent 400 from outreach.markViewed when /hi/<unknown-slug> is hit (observed in console during /hi visit but does not affect Calendly CTA rendering).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 7 listed UI checkpoints verified — 5-column board with correct counts, KPI block, card metadata pills, sales/skip exclusion, drag-and-drop via API fallback with re-derivation + KPI update, link-to-pipeline navigation, /hi Calendly href update, /admin/contacts regression intact)

test_credentials: Auth bypassed in dev (seed-owner-001 admin via DEV_BYPASS_USER in server/trpc.ts) per /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create+remove transient outreach contacts with slugs 'test-pipe-<ms-ts>' (one per test, idempotent cleanup via finally-less yield fixture). Jane Tyrrells was temporarily moved Awaiting → Booked → Lead → Awaiting during the frontend drag-and-drop test; final state restored. Sarah/Ollie untouched. Note: temp_contact fixture cleanup is via plain `yield + trpc_mutation('outreach.remove')` after yield; if a test crashes hard the row would persist (slug includes 'test-pipe-' prefix for easy manual purge).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable pytest: /app/backend/tests/test_pipeline_iter14.py (11 tests, idempotent, ~12s wall). Reusable previous: /app/backend/tests/test_new_features_iter13.py (13 tests for funnel + Calendly). Frontend selectors confirmed live: [data-testid=admin-pipeline-page], [data-testid=pipeline-board], [data-testid=pipeline-column-{lead|sent|awaiting|replied|booked}], [data-testid=pipeline-count-{stage}], [data-testid=pipeline-card-{slug}], [data-testid=pipeline-kpi-total|engaged|booked|rate], [data-testid=link-to-pipeline] (in /admin/contacts header), [data-testid=hi-cta-primary]. HTML5 native drag-and-drop is hard to drive headlessly; the reliable path is page.evaluate → fetch /api/trpc/outreach.setPipelineStage {json:{slug,stage}} → reload → assert deriveStage output. Stage derivation rules (deriveStage in AdminContactsPipeline.tsx): status sales|skip → null (filtered); demoBookedAt → booked; repliedAt → replied; smsSentAt && viewCount>0 → awaiting; smsSentAt → sent; else → lead. Default Calendly URL env: CALENDLY_DEFAULT_URL=https://calendly.com/ownology/new-meeting. Seeded pipeline state at test time: 26 leads, 0 sent, 1 awaiting (jane-tyrrells viewCount=3), 1 replied (ollie-margan-wines), 1 booked (sarah-mount-pleasant); 2 sales (manly-spirits, guillermo-archie-rose-spirits) excluded. outreach.list rows always include repliedAt key (null when unset).
rca of the issue: N/A — every spec checkpoint from the review_request passes. The five flagged code-review comments are forward-looking polish items (UX surprise on sent-vs-awaiting drop, lossy engagement timeline on lead→booked, no optimistic update on drop, no polling, no mobile layout), not bugs in the shipped feature.
